name: 9.1.0 — Fine-grained tokens
body:
## Highlights

This release adds first-class support for fine-grained personal access tokens and trims the cold-start allocation of the rate-limit handler.

## New features

- Fine-grained token scopes are now surfaced on `RateLimit`.
- `GitHubClient` accepts a custom `TimeProvider`, which makes retry-after handling testable.

## Bug fixes

- Fixed a `NullReferenceException` when a release had no assets.
- Pagination now follows the `Link` header when `per_page` is omitted.

name: 9.0.0 — Trimming and AOT
body:
## Breaking changes

The synchronous `IGitHubClient` surface has been removed. Every call is now `async` and returns a `Task`.

## Highlights

- The library is fully trimmable and AOT-compatible.
- Response deserialization moved to `System.Text.Json` source generators.

## Migration

Replace `client.Repository.Get(...)` with `await client.Repository.Get(...)`. The compiler will flag every call site that needs the change.

name: 8.1.0 — Webhook verification
body:
## New features

- Added `WebhookSignatureValidator` for verifying the `X-Hub-Signature-256` header.
- Added strongly-typed payloads for the `release` and `workflow_run` webhook events.

## Bug fixes

- Corrected the media type sent for raw blob requests.
